config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I think society matters a lot, but individual rights should not be treated as secondary by default, because that is how abuse and authoritarianism start. In my view, a healthy society protects people even when their rights are inconvenient to the majority. Public interest is important, but it should be balanced with strong limits on state power and respect for personal dignity.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus otomatis diutamakan di atas hak individu. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, sejarah kami sangat jelas menunjukkan bahwa ketika “demi masyarakat” dipakai tanpa batas, hasilnya sering berupa penyalahgunaan kekuasaan dan penindasan terhadap minoritas. Kepentingan publik memang penting untuk isu seperti keselamatan, kesehatan, dan ketertiban, tetapi hak individu seharusnya menjadi batas yang tidak boleh dilanggar sembarangan. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling mudah mengorbankan individu, melainkan yang mampu melindungi keduanya sekaligus.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think society should automatically come before the individual, because in Indonesia we know too well how “for the common good” can be used to silence dissent and excuse abuse. Public order, health, and social harmony matter, but they should not become a blank check for the state or the majority to trample personal rights. A good society is not one that asks individuals to disappear; it is one that protects people while still allowing the community to function. If the rights of the individual are weak, then the so-called interests of society can easily become a tool of oppression.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak pernyataan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan atas hak individu secara umum. Dari pengalaman Amerika, saya melihat bahwa argumen “demi kepentingan umum” sering dipakai untuk membenarkan pembatasan berlebihan, terutama terhadap kelompok minoritas atau orang yang tidak populer. Memang ada situasi seperti keselamatan publik, kesehatan, atau keadaan darurat di mana hak tertentu bisa dibatasi, tetapi itu harus sempit, jelas, dan diawasi ketat, bukan dijadikan prinsip default. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang kuat justru dibangun dengan melindungi hak individu, bukan dengan mengorbankannya lebih dulu.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I reject the idea that society should generally take priority over the individual, because in Indonesia that kind of logic is too easy to abuse by the state, the majority, or local power holders. Public safety and social order do matter, but they are not a blank check to silence criticism, restrict minorities, or treat personal rights as disposable. I also do not think rights and society are opposites: when individual rights are respected, society becomes more stable and more just, not weaker. The burden should be on those limiting rights to prove the restriction is truly necessary, not on individuals to prove they deserve basic protection.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak tegas gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu sebagai aturan umum. Dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika, sejarah kami menunjukkan bahwa ketika “demi kebaikan bersama” dijadikan alasan utama, hak minoritas dan kebebasan sipil sering jadi korban, dan itu bukan risiko kecil. Memang ada keadaan darurat, keselamatan publik, atau kesehatan masyarakat yang bisa membenarkan pembatasan terbatas, tetapi pembatasan itu harus sempit, sementara, dan diawasi ketat. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang kuat bukan yang paling cepat mengalahkan individu, melainkan yang paling disiplin membatasi kekuasaan agar hak tetap aman.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
